sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63180" key="liqoikodo/mhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐθ-οικοδόμητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63180.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">built of stone</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἰκία</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg006:261:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Top.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">261.29</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
